data.title: Robots & Pencils Expands Retail and Consumer Goods Leadership with Appointment of Saul Delage as Client Partner
data.description: Robots & Pencils, a company specializing in applied AI engineering, is making significant moves in the Retail and Consumer Goods sector as AI continues to transform competition within the industry. The company has appointed a 30-year industry veteran to spearhead their efforts in this vertical. Based in Cleveland, this strategic decision positions Robots & Pencils to capitalize on the evolving landscape.

data.title: Pardee Resources Company Announces Agreement to Sell its Table Grape Assets
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on April 22, 2026, Pardee Resources Company (OTC: PDER) revealed a significant development. The Company has finalized a deal to offload its table grape holdings to Joseph Vineyard Estates LLC, linked to Four Star Fruit, Inc. The transaction involves a complete sale for a sum consisting entirely of cash, with specific monetary figures undisclosed.

data.title: Oracle Advances AI Strategy With Google Cloud Collaboration
data.description: Shares of Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) have seen an increase in Wednesday's session following the company's collaboration with Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG) Google Cloud to enhance its AI capabilities. The partnership involves the introduction of the Oracle AI Database Agent for Gemini Enterprise, enabling customers to interact with their Oracle data using natural language. This advancement is expected to greatly improve efficiency in data management and decision-making processes. Oracle Cloud Infrastructure's senior vice president of product management, Nathan Thomas, emphasized that this integration of AI at the database level will enhance accuracy, strengthen controls, and optimize model usage without compromising sensitive data or adding complexity. The full story, including earnings and analyst outlook, can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mighty Capital Closes $91M Fund III, Tripling Its Size on the Strength of Six IPOs in Eight Years, Including Early Investments in Amplitude (NASDAQ: AMPL), and Groq
data.description: Mighty Capital, a venture capital firm based in San Francisco, has successfully expanded its institutional Limited Partner base by demonstrating the effectiveness of its product Alpha Effect™. On April 22, 2026, the firm revealed the closure of its Fund III, totaling $91 million. The fund received support from numerous investors and emphasizes product-led investing strategies.

data.title: RFID Tags Market Forecast to $15 Billion by 2032 with Aggressive Push for Smart Inventory Management and Integration with IoT
data.description: Research and analysis conducted on the global market for RFID tags projects significant growth potential in the sector. The market is categorized by type, including active, passive, and semi-passive tags, as well as by functionality such as transponder, reader, and middleware. Key drivers stimulating market expansion include the increasing need for real-time tracking and identification solutions. The forecast extends up to 2032, covering various applications and regions. The market trends indicate a positive outlook for the RFID industry.
MAN ACCUSED OF MURDERING COLOMBIAN SENATOR MIGUEL URIBE ARRESTED IN ARGENTINA: JUSTICE.

data.title: Round Room Celebrates Teachers Nationwide Through Employee-Powered Teachers Rock Initiative
data.description: An annual program in the United States is honoring educators through employee anecdotes and unexpected recognition. $10,000 will be given to chosen educators through video submissions nominated by employees. In addition, hundreds of teachers nationwide will receive support through donations, supplies, and classroom resources.

data.title: Toews Agility Shares to Launch Hedged Equity ETF June 15; Seeded via Tax-Deferred 351 ETF Exchange
data.description: A new Hedged Risk ETF, HRSK, is being introduced that combines dynamic hedging with a tax-aware seeding strategy through Section 351 ETF Exchange. Toews Asset Management, an investment firm focused on managed-risk strategies, unveiled this innovation. This ETF is set to provide investors with an opportunity to mitigate risk through its unique approach. Scheduled for launch in the near future, this development showcases an integration of strategic hedging methods with tax considerations.

data.title: Simplilearn and UC Santa Barbara Professional and Continuing Education Collaborate to launch the Applied Generative AI Specialization program
data.description: In Plano, Texas on April 22, 2026, Simplilearn, a prominent company in digital upskilling, has partnered with UC Santa Barbara Professional and Continuing Education (UCSB PaCE) to offer the Applied Generative AI Specialization course. The program will include over 50 hours of live classes and aims to enhance skills in artificial intelligence.

data.title: Binance.US slashes spot trading fees to near zero: maker fees at 0%, taker fees at 0.02% for all pairs, no volume tiers.
data.description: The exchange has announced a new fee structure, with maker fees set at 0% and taker fees at 0.02% for all trading pairs. This near-zero pricing applies to all users without any volume tiers or subscription obligations.

data.title: Aave sees $15B drop in deposits post Kelp exploit, causing users to withdraw funds amid uncertainty over protocol's losses.
data.description: Following the Kelp DAO bridge exploit, Aave has experienced a significant decrease in its supplied balance. Users are withdrawing funds due to uncertainty regarding the extent to which the protocol will absorb the shortfall linked to rsETH. The exploit has led to a drop in Aave's supplied balance, causing concern among users about potential losses. This uncertain situation has prompted users to pull funds from the protocol, resulting in a significant decrease in the platform's supplied balance.

data.title: Authorities in the UK conduct raids on eight locations for illegal peer-to-peer crypto trading, issuing cease-and-desist orders.
data.description: Eight locations were raided by the Financial Conduct Authority on suspicion of engaging in illicit peer-to-peer cryptocurrency trading. Cease-and-desist orders were issued as a result of the investigation conducted by the regulatory authority.

data.title: Forrester Research To Broadcast Its 2026 First-Quarter Earnings Conference Call
data.description: CAMBRIDGE, Mass.-- Forrester Research, Inc. (Nasdaq: FORR) is set to air its Q1 earnings conference call on May 6, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET. The call will be streamed on Forrester.com. Interested investors are advised to log on at least 15 minutes before the scheduled time. Pre-registration for the call is available with instructions provided to download essential audio applications. These programs are free of charge.

data.title: Treehub by AI Health Fund Launches to Scout the Next Generation of Founders in Academia and Science
data.description: In Palo Alto, California, Treehub, a residency near Stanford University, supported by the AI Health Fund, has been established. It is the initial boutique program of its kind aimed at identifying and supporting early-stage entrepreneurs from academic backgrounds. Located in Los Altos, it addresses a crucial stage in healthcare innovation by providing funding and guidance to promising founders who have often lacked capital and support during the transition from idea to viable company.

data.title: Eutelsat and PCTV Renew Long-term Partnership to Continue Video Distribution in Mexico
data.description: Eutelsat has recently disclosed that they are extending their video services in collaboration with PCTV, a prominent content aggregation and distribution company based in Mexico.

data.title: ISG to Study Generative AI Service Providers
data.description: A research study on providers assisting enterprises achieve scaled, value-creating transformation with GenAI has been initiated by ISG in Stamford, Connecticut. This study aims to delve into the efficacy of such providers in enabling companies to harness the potential of GenAI for transformational purposes.

data.title: Brain Support Cells Form Previously Unknown Network
data.description: A recent discovery in the field of neuroscience has provided a fresh perspective on how the brain communicates. According to a study conducted on mice, cells previously believed to have a minor function in brain activity have been found to establish extensive connections on their own. These pathways have the ability to link far-off regions of the brain in ways that were not previously understood. This groundbreaking research, conducted on mice, sheds new light on the intricate network of communication within the brain and challenges prior assumptions about the role of these cells. The study, carried out recently, reveals that these cells are critical players in facilitating long-range communication in the brain, revolutionizing our understanding of neural connectivity.

data.title: Frontier Releases 2026 GoWild Summer Pass at Lowest Ever Introductory Price, Providing 5+ Months of Unlimited Flights for Just $199
data.description: Frontier Airlines has introduced the 2026 GoWild Summer Pass at a historically low price. This pass allows consumers to purchase and plan their summer adventures with no blackout dates and guarantees dedicated seats on all flights. This offer is available for a limited time and provides an exclusive opportunity for travelers to enjoy seamless and hassle-free travel experiences.

data.title: Hard Rock International Amplifies 'Save the Planet' Commitment with Earth Hour 2026, Kicking Off a Month of Global Environmental Action
data.description: In April 2026, Hard Rock International Hotels, Casinos, and Cafes across the world celebrated a month-long initiative focused on immersive guest experiences, community action, and sustainability efforts. The global movement, now in its 8th year, aimed to raise awareness and drive positive change. The activities included various initiatives and events at Hard Rock properties, with numerous photos capturing the engagement. The impact of the campaign extended widely, highlighting the commitment of Hard Rock to social responsibility and environmental conservation.

data.title: Coco Robotics Launches with Uber Eats in San Jose, Expanding Autonomous Delivery Across the U.S.
data.description: San Jose, California, a prominent hub for technology, food, and innovation, is introducing on-demand robot delivery with the recent launch. Coco, in collaboration with Uber Eats, will provide autonomous vehicle delivery services to customers and merchants in the city. The launch took place on April 22, 2026.
